name: Summer Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine tomato sauce, onion, basil, salt, pepper, and oregano.
Set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, mix ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, and parsley.
Set aside.
3. Peel the zucchini and cut off the ends. Slice the zucchini lengthwise into strips.
Place the strips in an 8x8-inch baking dish. Cover with wax paper.
4. Microwave at high power for 6 to 8 minutes, or until the zucchini is fork-tender.
Rearrange the zucchini after half the cooking time and drain excess liquid.
Let cool slightly before proceeding.
5. Layer 4 to 6 of the zucchini strips in the bottom of the baking dish. Reserve
the remaining zucchini strips for the second layer. Spread ricotta mixture over
the zucchini slices.
6. Arrange sliced tomatoes on top of the ricotta layer. Cover with additional
zucchini slices, then pour the remaining tomato sauce over the zucchini and sprinkle
with Parmesan cheese.
7. Reduce microwave power to 50% (medium). Cook uncovered for 20 to 25 minutes,
or until the zucchini is tender and the mixture is hot in the center.
8. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
